name: Double Chocolate Refrigerator Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, baking powder, salt, baking soda, and cinnamon; set aside.
2. Cream butter and sugars in a large bowl until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in melted chocolate, egg, and vanilla until well combined.
4. Stir in the flour mixture and chocolate chips just until blended.
5. Shape dough into three 8-inch rolls.
6. If the dough is too soft, chill slightly before rolling out.
7. Wrap the rolls tightly in waxed paper or plastic wrap, then with aluminum foil.
8. Refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
9. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
10. Cut the chilled rolls into 1/4-inch slices using a sharp knife.
11. Place the slices on an ungreased baking sheet and bake for 8 to 10 minutes.
12. Cool the cookies on a wire rack.
Note: If wrapped tightly, these cookies will keep refrigerated for up to one week or frozen for two months.
